parameters.query: SELECT * FROM get_parent_info('{{ $('🔧 Parse Input').first().json.folder_type }}', '{{ $('🔧 Parse Input').first().json.year }}');

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: =name = '{{ $('🔧 Parse Input').first().json.folder_name }}' and '{{ $json.parent_folder_id }}' in parents and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and trashed = false

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM get_parent_info('{{ $('🔍 Get Parent For Search').first().json.parent_type }}', NULL);

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: =name = '{{ $json.parent_name }}' and '{{ $json.parent_parent_id }}' in parents and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and trashed = false

parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM register_folder(
  '{{ $('🔧 Prepare Create Parent').first().json.parent_type }}',
  '{{ $('🔧 Prepare Create Parent').first().json.parent_key }}',
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $('🔧 Prepare Create Parent').first().json.parent_parent_id }}',
  '{{ $('🔧 Prepare Create Parent').first().json.parent_parent_path }}/{{ $('🔧 Prepare Create Parent').first().json.parent_name }}'
);
